Event: Royal Challenge - Season 30
Event Date: 01/10/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: RI7
Sign of Silence Ring

Once in a while, whenever an enemy uses a ring, amulet, or totem ability, the ring wearer deals 325000 magic damage to that enemy and silences their ring, amulet, and totem abilities for 3 sec. Also, the ring wearer increases own physical and magic armor by 10% of the damage dealt for 3 sec.

Requirements: 98-100
